hypothesis: If universal machine learning interatomic potentials trained on MOF data generalize to the 100+ curated MOFs, then they will match DFT-level accuracy in structural optimization (convergence and final volumes), maintain MD stability with minimal volume drift in NpT at 300 K and 1 bar, predict bulk moduli consistent with Birch–Murnaghan EOS fits, and reproduce 300 K heat capacities within close agreement to Phonopy-based benchmarks, because the study benchmarks 20 MLIPs against DFT references across these four tasks.
